view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by confirming the presence of a condition step in the marketing campaign that checks if an email was opened. Specifically, the evidence from the prior step 'uc-need-validate-1' shows a condition step with the key 'if_opened', which directs the flow to 'send_offer' if the email is opened and to 'send_reminder' if not. This directly aligns with the requirement of implementing branching logic based on user interaction with emails.
